subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! Upon thee be My glory! The Wronged One maketh mention of thee and consoleth thee in that which hath befallen thee. By the life of God, verily I am with thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین علیک بهائی یذکرک المظلوم و یعزیک فیما ورد علیک لعمر الله انا معک و انا
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
